zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Clayton於1500年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法利頓時，她的父親Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight30歲，母親Lady Jane Farrington26歲。她於1512年4月2日與Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1548年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Clayton于1500年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾法利頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight30岁，母亲Lady Jane Farrington26岁。她于1512年4月2日与Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1548年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Clayton was born in 1500, in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight, was 30 and her mother, Lady Jane Farrington, was 26. She married Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope on 2 April 1512. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died about 1548, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Clayton est née en 1500, à Farington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Farrington, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope le 2 avril 1512. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1548, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Clayton 1500 in Farington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane Farrington 26. Sie hat am 2. April 1512 Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1548 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Clayton è nata il nel 1500 nel Farington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Jane Farrington, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope il 2 aprile 1512. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1548, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Claytonが1500年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Clayton, Knightは30歳，母Lady Jane Farringtonは26歳であった。1512年4月2日にSir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1548年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Clayton(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Farrington(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1512년 4월 2일 Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Clayton nasceu em 1500, em Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Farrington, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope em 2 de abril de 1512. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1548, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Clayton родилась в 1500 г. в местности фарингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Farrington, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope 2 апреля 1512 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1548 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Sir Christopher Lister Esq of Medhope el 2 de abril de 1512. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1548, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
